deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --noinput && (python manage.py load_occ_protocols || echo '[WARN] load_occ_protocols failed (non-fatal, continuing...)') && (python manage.py seed_demo_data || echo '[WARN] seed_demo_data failed (non-fatal, continuing...)') && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput --clear && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000} --workers 4 --worker-class sync --threads 2 --timeout 120 --access-logfile - --error-logfile -
